name: Q-10 --by skill aliases to grouping by subagent_id per the §26 skill = subagent equivalence
command: printf '{"ts":"2026-05-10T00:00:00Z","subagent_id":"review-types","prompt_id":"p","prompt_version":"1.0.0","model":"sonnet","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"latency_ms":3000,"exit_code":0,"finding_count":0}\n{"ts":"2026-05-23T00:00:00Z","subagent_id":"review-types","prompt_id":"p","prompt_version":"1.0.0","model":"sonnet","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"latency_ms":1000,"exit_code":0,"finding_count":0}\n' > log.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/velocity-report.sh" --log log.jsonl --by skill --now 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'review-types' err.txt && echo aliased 1>&2
